title: abutilon virgatum
intro: Abutilon virgatum, also known as the flowering maple, is a plant species within the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is native to parts of North and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon virgatum include its ability to help lower blood sugar levels, improve wound healing, and reduce inflammation. Abutilon virgatum can be prepared in herbal form as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
